data.content: Fixed the Beads CLI filter path so UI phase aliases work for list fetches: state=queued now returns queued workflow states and state=in_action returns active workflow states. Added regression coverage in bd-coverage, and verified 1brutus now returns 26 queued beats and 18 active beats through the real bd path. Validation: bun run lint; bunx tsc --noEmit; bun run test; bun run build.
